data.title: Marieke® Gouda Earns Global Recognition with Six Medals at the World Cheese Championship
data.description: In Thorp, Wisconsin on March 12, 2026, a group of cheese aficionados convened for the prestigious World Cheese Championship held in Madison. This event serves as a platform for top cheeses worldwide to vie for recognition. A panel of esteemed judges from various countries assesses the cheeses on various criteria such as taste, texture, and aroma.

data.title: Using Obesity Drug? Eli Lilly Flags Unknown Impurity Found In Compounded Weight Loss Drugs With Vitamin B12
data.description: Eli Lilly and Co recently issued a warning regarding safety risks associated with compounded tirzepatide products mixed with vitamin B12. The company discovered an impurity formed from the interaction of these two substances during internal testing. Marketed compounded products combining tirzepatide with vitamin B12 (methylcobalamin, hydroxocobalamin, or cyanocobalamin) in the U.S. were evaluated, revealing significant levels of this impurity. The potential health effects of this impurity are unknown, posing safety concerns. There is no available data on how it may affect tirzepatide's interaction with receptors or its toxicity. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: What's Going On With America's Car-Mart Stock Today?
data.description: America's Car-Mart, Inc. recently faced challenges in a tough quarter due to weather disruptions, lower sales volume, and transition-related pressures. Despite this, the company emphasized improved unit economics and increased flexibility following recent changes in its capital structure. The stock of America's Car-Mart is currently at a significant support level. However, CRMT experienced a new low due to third-quarter financial results. The company reported an adjusted earnings per share loss of $1.53, falling short of the expected loss of 28 cents. Quarterly sales amounted to $286.792 million, a 12% drop from the previous year, missing the analyst consensus of $331.927 million. Sales volumes declined by 22.1% to 10,275 units, reflecting limitations on originations caused by ongoing capital adjustments. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CENIC 2026 Innovations in Networking Award for Network Partner to University of Hawai’i’s David Lassner and Team
data.description: In La Mirada, California and San Francisco, the Corporation for Education Network Initiatives in California (CENIC) has revealed that David Lassner, President Emeritus of the University of Hawai'i, and his team will receive the CENIC 2026 Innovations in Networking Award for Network Partner. The accolade will be granted at CENIC's biennial conference called "The Right Connection" on March 31–April 1, 2026 in Monterey, CA. President Emeritus David Lassner's achievements will be celebrated at the event.

data.title: Virta Health’s Nutrition Therapy Extends Survival by 34% in Stage IV Pancreatic Cancer Patients, New Clinical Trial Shows
data.description: Virta Health, a prominent company specializing in reversing metabolic disease, shared findings from a Phase II clinical trial. Collaborating with USC Norris Comprehensive Cancer Center, Mayo Clinic, HonorHealth Research Institute, and additional partners, the trial delivered significant insights that could revolutionize the treatment of advanced pancreatic cancer. The study, published in Cancer after peer review, showcased promising results. This included how Virta’s tailored nutritional intervention approach, under medical supervision, offered early indications of its potential to transform current treatment strategies.

data.title: Bitcoin's value surges as bonds and stocks face challenges, learn the reasons behind this trend.
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped by 2% to its lowest point in five years, standing at 4.5%. This decrease represents a significant improvement, with over 500,000 new jobs created in the last quarter alone. Additionally, the stock market has seen a surge, reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Experts attribute this positive economic growth to increased consumer spending and a boost in the housing market. As the economy continues to recover, many are optimistic about future job prospects and financial stability for individuals and businesses.

data.title: Co-CEOs and Founders of The Brand Guild Named to Inc.’s Female Founders 500 List
data.description: Barbara Martin and Jayne Sandman, co-CEOs and founders of The Brand Guild, have been recognized among the Inc. Female Founders 500. This list showcases top female entrepreneurs driving growth in various industries like consumer brands, media, and professional services. Established in 2010, The Brand Guild is a marketing and communications agency offering services such as strategic communications and branding to assist founders, companies, and destinations in their growth. The founders have proven their success and dedication to the business, securing a spot on this prestigious list.

data.title: Insurity’s London International Conference to Bring Global Insurance Leaders Together to Explore the Future of Marine, AI, and Digital Insurance Platforms
data.description: Insurity will be holding a conference in London to address emerging risks, market trends, and technological advancements impacting the future of insurance operations. The event will cover a wide range of topics such as the latest industry developments and strategies, with experts discussing important issues in the insurance sector. The conference is set to attract a large number of attendees, including industry professionals, with significant numbers expected to participate in discussions and workshops. Overall, the event promises to provide valuable insights into the evolving landscape of insurance operations in the digital age.

data.title: ACTEC Announces Margaret G. Lodise as New President
data.description: Margaret G. Lodise has been appointed as the President of the American College of Trust and Estate Counsel (ACTEC) for the term 2026-2027. Currently a Partner at Sacks, Glazier, Franklin, Lodise, McMurtrey & Scheerer, LLP in Los Angeles, Lodise will lead the organization during the upcoming year. The announcement was made today by ACTEC.

data.title: An InventHelp 123Invent Client Develops Smart Bathtub Fixtures (HOF-668)
data.description: In Pittsburgh on March 12, 2026, an individual from Houston, Texas, shared their motivation behind creating innovative bathtub fixtures. This invention, known as the SMART TUB AND SHOWER VALVE, aims to offer control over water temperature, pressure, and fill level. The inventor, a plumber, sought to introduce a user-friendly solution, highlighting the importance of customization in household fixtures.

data.title: Cox Automotive Surpasses Major EV Battery Recycling Milestone
data.description: EV Battery Solutions has successfully recovered over 10 million pounds of black mass, ensuring that vital battery minerals remain in circulation and promoting the development of a more sustainable EV industry. This achievement was announced by Cox Automotive in Atlanta on March 12, 2026. This significant progress in EV battery recycling marks a crucial step towards a circular economy for electric vehicles.

data.title: Short-Term Rentals Pose Insurance Risks for Homeowners and Multi-Unit Dwellings
data.description: In Malvern, Pennsylvania, short-term rentals are becoming increasingly popular, but homeowners and owners of multi-unit dwellings are at risk of facing insurance challenges, as reported by Triple-I.
